title: Pow(x, n)
hints: Consider how the problem changes if the exponent is even versus odd. Can you reduce the size of the problem at each step?
Use the divide-and-conquer technique known as exponentiation by squaring to solve this in logarithmic time.
Handle negative exponents by inverting the base. Be careful with the most negative 32-bit integer, as its absolute value may overflow a standard integer type.
